⚠️ Warning to anyone considering Groww Credit.

My mutual funds have still not been unpledged despite repeated complaints, multiple warnings, and more than a month of waiting. As a result, I have been denied access to my own money when I needed it the most.

The most disappointing part is Groww's grievance redressal system. Every email receives the same generic response, but the issue never gets resolved. There is no ownership, no accountability, and no urgency—even when customers may be facing medical or financial emergencies.

This experience has completely eroded my trust. I will be withdrawing all my investments from Groww once this issue is finally resolved.

If you're investing through Groww Credit, think carefully before pledging your mutual funds. When you need your own money, you may find yourself waiting indefinitely while customer support keeps sending template replies instead of providing a solution.

Review Title: Minimal, Accessible, and Investor Friendly, one feature request
Review Text:
The app is excellent. It has everything an investor needs, presented in a clean, minimal, and intuitive UI/UX.

One suggestion: please add an option to create portfolios in the Mutual Funds section, similar to the feature available for Stocks.

Currently, I have to manually calculate how much I’ve invested in equity funds and track their returns because both equity and debt funds are combined in the dashboard. A portfolio feature would make it much easier to organize and visualize different categories, such as wealth-building funds and goal-based funds, while also showing the total investment and returns for each portfolio separately.

This would greatly improve portfolio tracking and provide a much better user experience.
